title: ornithopteris cuneata
intro: Ornithopteris cuneata, also known as the narrow-leaved fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Matoniaceae. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ornithopteris cuneata include its ability to help alleviate symptoms of arthritis and other inflammatory conditions, as well as its potential to protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. In herbal preparations, the leaves of the plant can be made into teas or infusions, or dried and used in capsules or tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
